# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Elevate Your DSA Practice with AI-assisted Challenges
- Summary: Showcase the new AI-assisted problem-solving guidance and Azure OpenAI integration in CodeGrind, highlighting how users can tackle LeetCode-style challenges with real-time AI help.
- Slug: codegrind-engagement-augmentation
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-engagement-augmentation
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-13-codegrind-engagement-augmentation.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now pairs a real-time code editor with Azure OpenAI-powered assistance, empowering users to reason through problems, learn strategies, and improve solutions faster while keeping momentum in competitive practice.
- CTA: Try an AI-assisted problem now and share your approach in the comments.
- Visual brief: A short screen-capture style video showing the CodeGrind editor: user selects a LeetCode-like problem, types in solution, AI assistant panel provides hints and model answers, then user improves code with guidance. Include UI elements like problem description, code editor, and AI chat pane. End with a quick call-to-action to start a problem and sign in with Google.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
